scripts.setup: npm install && cd blockchain && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:blockchain & npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.build: npm run build:blockchain && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.deploy:contract: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.test: npm run test:blockchain && npm run test:server
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules blockchain/node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules && npm install
